findings.description: The section opens with "Nablarch 5のリリース一覧。" — this phrase does not appear in the source. The source title is simply "リリース情報" with no introductory sentence. While the inference is contextually reasonable (the file lives under v5/), the source does not state this.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: 「リリース情報」 — no introductory sentence exists before the download link.
